description: Shared, verifiable memory for AI agents and robots: signed tokens that resolve and verify offline.
name: io.github.Vortx-AI/emem

environmentVariables.description: PaaS port convention: the container entrypoint binds 0.0.0.0:$PORT when EMEM_BIND is not set explicitly. Falls back to 5051.
environmentVariables.name: PORT

environmentVariables.description: Bind address for the HTTP server. When unset, the entrypoint derives it from PORT, falling back to 0.0.0.0:5051.
environmentVariables.name: EMEM_BIND

environmentVariables.description: Path to the persistent data directory (sled cache + ed25519 identity). Mount a volume here; on managed platforms that mount /data, set EMEM_DATA=/data.
environmentVariables.name: EMEM_DATA

environmentVariables.description: Optional canonical origin for self-referencing URLs in MCP responses (e.g. https://emem.dev). When unset the server falls back to urn:emem.
environmentVariables.name: EMEM_PUBLIC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated hostnames for built-in Let's Encrypt ACME (TLS-ALPN-01). When set, the server binds 0.0.0.0:443 instead of EMEM_BIND.
environmentVariables.name: EMEM_TLS_DOMAINS

title: emem, the verifiable memory protocol for the physical world
